final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 工笔重彩 long-scroll illustration of the 元宵灯会 in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩 long-scroll (长卷) aesthetic — exact brushwork, pigment layering, and scroll proportions are yours
Composition: must be a horizontal long-scroll (长卷) format with panoramic sweep
Subject: must include the 元宵灯会 scene with 万盏花灯 illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 as the setting, full cityscape visible at night
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, lantern-lit night atmosphere — exact light diffusion and shadow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a rich, luminous direction befitting 工笔重彩 — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional silk or paper scroll surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints:
